title: England missing final piece of jigsaw - Kane
summary: England captain Harry Kane says the team is missing crucial elements after their World Cup defeat to Argentina, indicating the need for tactical and squad improvements.
content: England captain Harry Kane says the team are "missing that final piece of the jigsaw" and need to "find a way to get better" following defeat to Argentina.

zh.title: 英格兰缺少最后一块拼图 - 凯恩
zh.summary: 英格兰队长哈里·凯恩表示，球队在世界杯对阿根廷的失利后缺少关键因素，表明需要进行战术和阵容改进。

title: Sheffield United manager Wilder extends contract
summary: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder has extended his contract through summer 2028, securing his position in his third spell with the club.
content: Chris Wilder, in his third spell as Sheffield United manager, extends his contract until the summer of 2028.

zh.title: 谢菲尔德联队主教练威尔德延长合同
zh.summary: 谢菲尔德联队主教练克里斯·威尔德已将合同延长至2028年夏天，确保了他在俱乐部第三个任期内的地位。

title: Dragojevic deal almost done for Rangers - gossip
summary: Serbian midfielder Dragojevic is close to completing a transfer to Rangers, while a Celtic defender reportedly moves to France in the ongoing summer window.
content: Serbian midfielder close to completing Rangers switch, with Celtic defender on the way to France...

zh.title: 德拉戈耶维奇交易即将完成 - 流言蜚语
zh.summary: 塞尔维亚中场球员德拉戈耶维奇即将完成转会至流浪者队，而凯尔特人后卫据报道在夏季转会窗口期间转会至法国。

title: World Cup stars who could move this summer
summary: As the World Cup concludes, attention turns to the 2026-27 club season with several World Cup-winning players expected to transfer during the summer window.
content: As the World Cup approaches its end, attentions are turning to the 2026-27 club season - and the players who could be on the move this summer.

zh.title: 可能在今年夏天转会的世界杯明星
zh.summary: 随着世界杯的结束，人们的关注转向2026-27赛季，多名世界杯冠军球员预计将在夏季转会窗口期间完成转会。

title: Wrexham boss Parkinson relishing Man Utd 'test'
summary: Wrexham will face Manchester United in a friendly in Helsinki, with United manager Michael Carrick unavailable due to World Cup players needing rest.
content: Wrexham take on the Premier League giants in Helsinki on Saturday, although United boss Michael Carrick will be without several of his World Cup players.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆主帅帕金森期待曼联的"考验"
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆将在赫尔辛基与曼联进行友谊赛，由于世界杯球员需要休息，曼联主帅迈克尔·卡里克将无法参加。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 40
summary: A interactive guessing game where readers attempt to identify a World Cup star player in as few attempts as possible.
content: Will you get today's player? Try to guess his identity in as few attempts as possible.

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯明星第40号
zh.summary: 一个互动猜谜游戏，读者们尝试通过尽可能少的尝试来识别一位世界杯明星球员。

title: Effort, spirit and moments - but do England lack all-round quality?
summary: BBC Sport analyst Phil McNulty evaluates England's World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, questioning whether Thomas Tuchel's team lacks sufficient all-around quality despite strong effort and moments.
content: As England reflect on their World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina, BBC Sport's Phil McNulty looks at what Thomas Tuchel's team were lacking.

zh.title: 努力、精神和亮点 - 但英格兰缺乏全面实力吗？
zh.summary: BBC体育分析师菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂评估了英格兰在世界杯半决赛中对阿根廷的失败，质疑托马斯·图赫尔的球队是否缺乏足够的全面实力，尽管表现出了强大的拼搏精神和精彩时刻。
